members.notes: Elementor WordPress. 10/page, 23 pages. Pagination: ?e-page-f7b8172=N. Dates in text. Verified 2026-04-17.
Page exists but div.page-content is empty. New senator, no releases published yet. Verified 2026-04-17. Remove expect_empty flag once first release publishes.
WordPress Divi (et_pb_post). Old URL was wrong UUID path. Dates "Apr 16, 2026". Verified 2026-04-17.
Fixed 2026-04-18: URL was /news (landing page), changed to /news/press (press list). Selectors were matching nav items. Uses ?pagenum_rs=N pagination.
Fixed 2026-04-25: was rss + generic table tr; switched to httpx + ColdFusion-specific selectors. 253 pages.
Found 8 items on listing page.  JetEngine/Elementor AJAX pagination. Needs Playwright for deep backfill.
Fixed 2026-04-18: Wrong RSS URL (/press-releases/feed/ -> /category/news/press-releases/feed/). Switched to httpx with Divi selectors. 18/page.

Fixed 2026-04-18 (evening): site exposes a ColdFusion resultset.cfm endpoint that returns all 5400+ releases on one page. No Playwright needed. Static HTML with table tr/td layout. Pagination disabled -- single page covers full archive. Daily update should use /news/press-releases (page 1 only) or keep hitting the all-results URL; backfill uses all-results.

ArticleBlock (a.ArticleBlock wraps .ArticleBlock__title with h2.ArticleTitle + .Heading--overline date in MM.DD.YYYY). Old title=a captured entire block text including date and excerpt.

ColdFusion table rows; date in preceding <td>. Junk anchor links filtered by td.recordListTitle selector.

Found 20 items on listing page. Op-eds collected separately via pipeline.scripts.backfill_paul_op_eds (WP-JSON /op_eds custom post type). Some op-eds carry date_source='wp_modified_migration' from a 2026-03-02 site migration that re-stamped recent items.
